news.headline: H World Group's financial results show strong growth with 7.8% increase in Q4 revenue to RMB6.0 billion and 9.2% increase in 2024 revenue to RMB23.9 billion.
news.summary: The impressive growth trajectory of the company is supported by rapid network expansion, increasing revenue without heavy asset investment, and a growing membership base, all indicating sustained momentum in the long term. Key points from the latest report show a 7.8% year-on-year increase in fourth quarter revenue, amounting to RMB6.0 billion (equivalent to US$825 million). Looking at the full year, revenue for 2024 rose by 9.2% year-on-year to RMB23.9 billion.

news.headline: CPSC announces Tzumi Electronics recall of FitRx SmartBell XL Dumbbells due to impact injury risk. View at www.cpsc.gov.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed recalls in collaboration with various firms. The Tzumi Electronics company is recalling FitRx SmartBell XL Quick-Select Adjustable Dumbbells due to the risk of impact injury. For more details on the recalls, the public is encouraged to visit www.cpsc.gov.

news.headline: PBS to air two-hour special celebrating 50 years of Austin City Limits on April 4, 2025. Features various artists.
news.summary: A special Primetime event marking the 50th anniversary will air on PBS on April 4, 2025, lasting two hours. The lineup includes prominent artists such as Chris Stapleton, Gary Clark Jr., Billy Strings, Leon Bridges, Lyle Lovett, Shawn Colvin, Indigo Girls, Brandy Clark, Cam, Rufus Wainwright, The Mavericks, Ángela Aguilar, and Eve Monsees.

news.headline: QNB Corp. moves from Pink market to OTCQX Best Market, parent company of QNB Bank. Quakertown, PA. OT with symbol QNBC.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Quakertown, Pennsylvania, QNB Corp., the parent company of QNB Bank, revealed its qualification to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market, under the ticker symbol QNBC. Formerly trading on the Pink® market, the company's move to the OTCQX signifies an upgrade in its trading status, reflecting increased stature and credibility in the market. This adjustment is poised to offer enhanced visibility and accessibility to investors, elevating QNB Corp.'s standing in the financial sector.

news.headline: Truist (NYSE: TFC) will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 17, 2025, with Chairman Bill Rogers and CFO Mike Maguire.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, March 20, 2025 - Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on April 17, 2025, before the market opens. Chairman and CEO Bill Rogers, along with CFO Mike Maguire, will be responsible for presenting the results. Investors and stakeholders can expect important insights into the corporation's financial status on this date.

news.headline: DICK'S Sporting Goods partners with IShowSpeed, Tom Brady, Kevin Durant, Suni Lee, and Travis Hunter for new footwear campaign. #NYE: DKS
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, DICK'S Sporting Goods (NYSE: DKS) unveiled a fresh footwear advertising initiative named Speed Shopping. The campaign highlights DICK'S as the go-to spot for athletes' footwear requirements, displaying a wide range of performance and lifestyle sneakers.

news.headline: March 20, 2025: Orion Corporation discloses BlackRock, Inc. as a major shareholder in accordance with Securities Market Act.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, at 15:30 EET, Orion Corporation released important information regarding major shareholder announcements. This update pertains to significant changes in ownership and investments within the company. Please refer to the latest stock exchange release for further details and specific numbers related to these developments.

news.headline: Trump pressures Fed to cut rates on 'Liberation Day in America' amid rising uncertainty. Fed keeps rates at 4.25%-4.50%. Tariffs expected to ease. Fed urged to "do the right thing." Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: President Donald Trump wasted no time in urging the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, dubbing Apr. 2 as “Liberation Day in America” when reciprocal tariffs take effect. The Fed, on the other hand, signaled heightened economic uncertainty, slashing growth forecasts and boosting inflation expectations. Following the Federal Open Market Committee's decision to maintain interest rates at 4.25%-4.50%, Trump took to his Truth Social platform, pressing the Central Bank to “do the right” thing by cutting rates amidst the transitioning tariffs. Trump justified the call for lower borrowing costs by pointing out how tariffs would move through the economy. He emphasized the necessity for the Fed to cut rates in the wake of the changing economic landscape.

news.headline: US drone surveying market to reach $2.54 billion by 2033, double-digit growth predicted. Technology improvements driving industry advancements.
news.summary: In Palm Beach, Florida, as of March 20, 2025, the drone sector has been experiencing significant advancements in technology. There have been numerous notable developments in the uses and functionality of drones, leading to a surge in the market. The industry has seen substantial growth, with a notable increase in sales and adoption rates.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Inspiren revolutionizes senior living with $35M Series A funding, AI technology for better care, safety, and efficiency.
news.summary: With a substantial $35 million injection from its Series A funding, Inspiren is revolutionizing care planning, bolstering resident safety, optimizing emergency response, and streamlining staff workflows in the senior care sector. Based in New York, this innovative company is at the forefront of utilizing AI technology to enhance operations in this critical industry.

news.headline: AZmed partners with UP centre and Radiologie Dix30 in Canada to advance pediatric and emergency radiology with AI innovation.
news.summary: In Paris on March 20, 2025, AZmed revealed a significant collaboration with UP Centre for Pediatric Emergencies and Radiologie Dix30, enhancing their position in the Canadian healthcare sector with cutting-edge AI technology. This partnership elevates the two centers to the forefront of innovation, with the introduction of AZtrauma, an AI-powered system designed to revolutionize emergency medical treatment.

news.headline: Banuba in Dubai improves AI makeup recommendations with seasonal color analysis in TINT Virtual Try-On Platform.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Banuba has enhanced its automated seasonal color analysis and AI makeup recommendations, improving both accuracy and speed. This advancement is set to benefit a larger number of users, making the process more efficient and precise.

news.headline: LookDeep Health releases AI study in Frontiers in Imaging, highlighting model training and architecture.
news.summary: LookDeep Health, a tech company based in Oakland, California, has recently released a detailed peer-reviewed paper in Frontiers in Imaging. The paper showcases their innovative use of AI and computer vision technology to enhance patient care in hospital settings. The study focuses on key aspects such as model training, architectural selection, and the practical implementation of artificial intelligence. It delves into how these technologies are making a significant impact, highlighting both the strengths and obstacles faced in real-world scenarios. This development signifies a significant step forward in leveraging AI to advance healthcare practices.

news.headline: Reltio & Alation integrate for AI & data management, improving governance & quality. Simplifies for enterprise AI initiatives.
news.summary: In Redwood Shores, California, a company called Reltio® unveiled Reltio Integration with Alation, a significant move in the field of AI-powered data unification and management. This partnership offers customers a reliable, unified data foundation essential for powering AI solutions, along with streamlined data governance and superior data quality. Many enterprises are focusing on AI initiatives, but challenges such as insufficient data quality, inconsistent business language, and inadequate governance can hinder their effectiveness. This integration aims to address these obstacles and enhance the AI capabilities of organizations.

news.headline: RLTYco launches "Agent Brew" podcast hosted by Eric Zollinger, post-$20M Series A funding for nationwide expansion.
news.summary: In New York, RLTYco, a full-service provider for real estate professionals, has unveiled its latest podcast, "Agent Brew," hosted by industry expert Eric Zollinger. The podcast launch aligns with RLTYco's successful $20 million Series A funding led by Altriarch. This funding boost will support the company's nationwide service expansion. "Agent Brew" aims to offer real estate professionals crucial insights, strategies, and industry updates to enhance their knowledge and expertise.

news.headline: WellTheory and IBI release report on impact of autoimmune disease on US employees, 50 million affected, focuses on health and productivity.
news.summary: In Atherton, California, WellTheory, a unique virtual platform for those struggling with autoimmune disease, has launched a revolutionary Autoimmune Disease Impact Report in collaboration with the Integrated Benefits Institute (IBI). This report delves into the challenges faced by the 50 million Americans affected by autoimmune diseases, offering insights and data-driven solutions. The IBI, a nonprofit organization dedicated to enhancing the quality of employee health and productivity initiatives, partnered with WellTheory to produce this comprehensive report, shedding light on the impact of autoimmune diseases on individuals and the workforce as a whole.

news.headline: XR and Scope3 partner to reduce carbon footprint in digital ads; integration to measure carbon emissions data.
news.summary: A reputable global technology company, XR, has recently revealed a strategic collaboration with Scope3, a prominent entity specializing in reducing carbon footprints within media and advertising sectors. The partnership aims to incorporate cutting-edge carbon emissions data directly into XR's platform. Such integration will empower brands to effectively gauge, oversee, and diminish the carbon footprint associated with their digital advertisements. This move will embed sustainability within the creative distribution process, fostering ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) performance, and enhancing customer value. It is noteworthy that digital and streaming advertising play a significant role in contributing to carbon emissions.

news.headline: Sagard Real Estate buys Grande Oaks in Roswell, GA, adding 270 units to its portfolio in the Southeast.
news.summary: Sagard Real Estate, a prominent real estate investment firm, has just revealed its purchase of Grande Oaks, a garden-style apartment complex in Roswell, Georgia consisting of 270 units. This acquisition bolsters Sagard Real Estate’s presence in the Southeast region, underscoring its pledge to invest in well-positioned properties with significant growth opportunities and lasting value. Grande Oaks, constructed in 1996, occupies a substantial area of over 311,000 rentable square feet.

news.headline: RLJ Lodging Trust's Chief Financial Officer, Sean Mahoney, is retiring in May after 7 years, with over 30 years of experience.
news.summary: RLJ Lodging Trust, based in Bethesda, Md., disclosed that its Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Sean M. Mahoney, will retire in May of this year after seven years with the company. Mahoney's retirement comes after a successful career of over 30 years, with over 20 years in the hospitality Real Estate Investment Trust industry. The Company, listed on the NYSE as RLJ, expressed gratitude to Mahoney for his significant contributions during his time with the company.

news.headline: OMNY Health integrates 4 billion unstructured clinical notes for advanced healthcare research insights.
news.summary: OMNY Health, a prominent healthcare ecosystem specializing in compliant real-world data insights, has revealed the incorporation of a substantial 4 billion unstructured clinical notes into its network. Through partnerships with various provider organizations such as academic medical centers and integrated delivery networks, OMNY Health has successfully repurposed these once inaccessible data points into valuable research insights. This strategic initiative aims to tackle the persistent issue of leveraging the significance of clinician notes for research purposes.

news.headline: AtScale's 2025 Semantic Layer Summit on May 28 in Boston details keynote lineup and registration.
news.summary: A virtual event called the 2025 Semantic Layer Summit will take place on May 28, organized by AtScale in Boston. The summit aims to showcase advancements in the semantic layer and GenAI capabilities, with industry experts leading the discussions.

news.headline: Balfour Beatty Communities' Aspire at West Campus and Oktiv recognized among Top 100 Student Housing Properties by J Turner Research.
news.summary: A national real estate investment and management company, Balfour Beatty Communities, based in Malvern, PA, celebrates the recognition of two of its student housing properties. Aspire at West Campus in Iowa City, IA, and Oktiv in Tallahassee, FL, were both honored in the Top 100 Student Housing Properties in the Nation for their exceptional online reputation by J Turner Research. Aspire at West Campus, situated at the University of Iowa campus, features one- and two-bedroom apartment homes and has garnered significant attention for its outstanding reputation.

news.headline: Ever Wealth, a firm with over $170 million in client assets, joins Osaic's network of financial professionals for growth.
news.summary: Osaic, a leading provider of wealth management solutions, has recently welcomed Ever Wealth, an advisory firm from Auburn, Indiana, into its network of financial professionals. Ever Wealth, boasting over $170 million in client assets, made the strategic decision to affiliate with Osaic due to a mutual goal of driving growth and productivity. The partnership emphasizes creating customized financial plans for clients, highlighting a dedication to personalized wealth management strategies.

news.headline: Conquest Planning partners with PWL Capital to expand hyper-personalized financial planning in Canada.
news.summary: A new collaboration between Conquest Planning and PWL Capital is set to broaden the availability of highly customized financial planning services throughout Canada. This partnership aims to reach a larger audience with tailored financial solutions.

news.headline: Hurricane Electric expands with new PoP in Minnetonka, MN at 12450 Wayzata Blvd, equipped with reliable power, security, and network support.
news.summary: Hurricane Electric, the leading IPv6-native Internet backbone globally, revealed the establishment of a fresh Point of Presence (PoP) in Ridgeview Minnetonka in Minnetonka, MN. Situated at 12450 Wayzata Blvd, 1 Floor, Suite 110, Minneapolis (Minnetonka) MN 55305, this new PoP boasts dependable AC and DC power, UPS, numerous backup generators, round-the-clock security and technical assistance, and a network tie to the Midwest Internet Cooperative Exchange.

news.headline: Realbotix and Hollo.AI present AI-Powered Conversational Robot at Roth Conference. (Numbers: 37th Annual Roth Capital Partners Conference, Realbotix, TSX-V: XBOT)
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp., a prominent humanoid robot creator listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF, has collaborated with Hollo.AI, a top conversational AI and digital twin platform. The partnership resulted in integrating Hollo.AI's human-like conversational AI into a Realbotix robot. This advanced integration was showcased at the 37th Annual Roth Capital Partners Conference in Dana Point, California. The demonstration highlighted the seamless interaction between Hollo.AI's conversational AI and the physical form of a Realbotix robot.

news.headline: Arctic7 introduces A7 Digital division in Austin, specializing in infrastructure support for various industries.
news.summary: Arctic7, based in Austin, Texas, has announced the launch of A7 Digital, a digital services arm dedicated to providing high-quality infrastructure and operations support across various sectors.

news.headline: Caldera Medical acquires Ethicon’s Gynecare TVT™ products, enhancing global expansion for women’s health. Major milestone for company.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Caldera Medical, a prominent provider of women's health medical devices, has completed the acquisition of Ethicon’s Gynecare TVT™ product line. This acquisition marks a significant advancement for Caldera Medical, which has been dedicated to enhancing women's quality of life for over 23 years. The acquired TVT product family includes TVT, TVT Exact, TVT-O, and TVT Abbrevo, offering minimally invasive treatment solutions for women. Caldera Medical will be overseeing the transition of these products in the upcoming months, expanding its portfolio to cater to a broader demographic of women globally.

news.headline: Morningmate partners with WYD Seoul 2027, leveraging AI for seamless collaboration for millions at the event.
news.summary: Morningmate has formed a partnership with WYD Seoul 2027 in South Korea to improve real-time communication and streamline project management through AI collaboration tools. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency and productivity by leveraging advanced technology.

news.headline: Sunday Swagger unveils Spring 2025 collection with over 40 new polo designs, emphasizing comfort and performance.
news.summary: In YORBA LINDA, Calif., Sunday Swagger, a sought-after performance golf and lifestyle apparel brand, unveiled their latest product lineup for spring 2025. This collection includes over 40 new polo designs that are sure to make a statement and trigger discussions. Made from a comfortable and flexible poly-spandex blend, these polos are moisture-wicking, wrinkle-resistant, and offer UPF 40 sun protection. The brand prioritizes both style and functionality, catering to customers' desires to look and feel their best while out on the golf course or in everyday life.

news.headline: Juvare partners with ICEYE to improve disaster response with real-time satellite data. Collaboration to benefit emergency agencies.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Juvare, a leading global provider of crisis and emergency management technology, has partnered with ICEYE, a frontrunner in synthetic aperture radar (SAR) satellite data. This strategic collaboration aims to offer unparalleled situational awareness and actionable insights to emergency management agencies, insurers, and government bodies on a global scale. ICEYE's high-resolution, all-weather satellite capabilities will be incorporated into Juvare's platform, enhancing the effectiveness of response efforts.

news.headline: Montefiore unveils 7 new mental health programs with $18M grant, addressing critical care gaps in Bronx.
news.summary: Grant funding exceeding $18 million from the New York State Office of Mental Health has enabled Montefiore Health System in Bronx, N.Y., to introduce seven additional outpatient programs. These initiatives aim to enhance services for individuals experiencing urgent mental health needs. The programs are set to commence operation following the grant award on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Taco John's shares strategic blueprint for sustainable growth, offering operational efficiencies, market-focused strategies for franchisees in QSR industry.
news.summary: A successful franchise development model has been identified as a key factor in driving success for both new and existing franchise owners. With operational efficiencies, top-tier support, and growth strategies tailored to the market, this model has led to a smart expansion. Franchisees are provided with a clear roadmap to confidently scale their businesses in the Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) industry. This approach has resulted in significant results, as indicated by the rising number of franchise owners and successful establishments.

news.headline: Solomon Global discusses gold's rise above $3000 at Master Investor Show 2025, highlighting its importance in uncertain markets.
news.summary: As gold surpasses the $3000 mark and persists in reaching record highs, the focus now shifts to its future trajectory. London witnessed this development on March 20, 2025, as Solomon Global, a prominent gold bullion provider, prepares to be a key participant at the Master Investor Show 2025. This event stands as the biggest in the UK for individual investors.

news.headline: Global gourmet ice cream market expected to reach USD 60.67 billion by 2033, from USD 15.43 billion in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 16.43%.
news.summary: The global gourmet ice cream market was valued at USD 15.43 billion in 2024 and is predicted to reach USD 60.67 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.43% during 2025-2033. Gourmet ice cream is high-end frozen dessert made in small batches with premium ingredients, having denser, creamier consistency and unique flavors like gelato, sorbet, and frozen custard. The market growth is driven by consumer preference for quality over quantity, increasing disposable incomes, and interest in artisanal flavors. Companies like Smoor and Hangyo Ice Creams are capitalizing on this trend by launching luxury ice cream ranges. The industry is also expanding into emerging markets to accelerate growth.

news.headline: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ:FIVE) beats Q4 expectations with $1.391B revenue and $3.48 EPS. Total revenue up 4%, comparable sales down 3%.
news.summary: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ:FIVE) saw an increase in shares trading following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results, which exceeded analyst expectations. The company reported a revenue of $1.391 billion for the fourth quarter, surpassing estimates of $1.386 billion. Additionally, their adjusted earnings were $3.48 per share, beating estimates of $3.38 per share. The company experienced a 4% year-over-year increase in total revenue, while comparable sales dropped by 3% year-over-year. Five Below also expanded by opening 22 new stores in the fourth quarter, bringing their total number of locations to 1,771. At the end of the period, the company had $331.72 million in cash and cash equivalents.

news.headline: FactSet beats Q2 EPS with $4.28, revenue at $570.66 million; client count at 8,645 & ASV at $2.306 billion.
news.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE:FDS) announced strong second-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share reaching $4.28, surpassing the expected $4.16. The company recorded quarterly sales of $570.66 million, marking a 4.5% increase from the previous year and slightly exceeding the estimated $570.61 million. Organic revenues for the quarter grew by 4.0% year over year, reaching $568.0 million.As of February 28, 2025, FactSet's client count stood at 8,645, with a net gain of 396 clients in the last three months. This growth was primarily driven by corporate clients, including those acquired from the Irwin deal. The Annual Subscription Value as of the same date was reported at $2.306 billion, up from $2.185 billion a year ago. FactSet noted that organic ASV rose by $19.6 million during the period. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. has new time charter contract with Cargill for m/v DSI Andromeda at US$14,000/day until Jan 15, 2026.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on March 20, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) disclosed a new time charter agreement for one of its Ultramax dry bulk vessels, the m/v DSI Andromeda, through a subsidiary. The deal is with Cargill Ocean Transportation (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., at a gross charter rate of US$14,000 per day, before a 4.75% commission to third parties. This charter will run from March 29, 2025, until at least November 15, 2025, with the possibility of extending until January 15, 2026. The m/v DSI Andromeda was previously chartered to Bunge SA, Geneva, at a rate of US$13,500 per day, after a 5.00% commission to third parties.

news.headline: VivoPower to spin off Caret Digital with a direct Nasdaq listing and dividend share distribution plan.
Golar LNG secures $1.2 billion finance lease agreements with Chinese leasing companies for FLNG Gimi, closing in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Golar LNG Limited has revealed securing finance lease agreements with a group of top Chinese leasing companies to refinance the current debt facility for FLNG Gimi. The sale leaseback facility is worth around $1.2 billion and is anticipated to be finalized in Q2 2025, pending closure conditions like documentation and approvals from third parties.

news.headline: Soul of Nomad introduces limited edition "Emissary of Speed" luxury golf bag, combining technology and elegance.
news.summary: A luxury membership brand based in Silicon Valley, Soul of Nomad, has recently unveiled its latest innovation - the limited-edition luxury golf bag named “Emissary of Speed.” This exclusive creation, part of the Kennedy Golf Line, is a cutting-edge luxury leather golf bag designed for competitive play while exuding sophistication. The bag is tailored to meet the challenges of intense golfing, showcasing unparalleled elegance and style.

news.headline: CenterWell is providing personalized health care to seniors at Gladstone Walmart in Missouri.
news.summary: CenterWell is set to offer seniors in Gladstone, Missouri with convenient and personalized healthcare services at the local Walmart. The initiative aims to enhance access to medical care for seniors within the area.

news.headline: Firebirds promotes Steve Sturm to COO and Andy Seiple to Executive Chef to drive growth and enhance guest experience.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Firebirds Wood Fired Grill has promoted Steve Sturm to Chief Operating Officer (COO) and Andy Seiple to Corporate Executive Chef. This award-winning American restaurant and steakhouse aims to enhance operational efficiency and improve menu offerings under their leadership. The company is focused on growth and providing an outstanding guest experience through these strategic appointments. Steve Sturm's promotion and Andy Seiple's new position highlight the commitment to excellence in their roles within the company.

news.headline: ACE from Tencent demonstrates AI-powered anti-cheat innovations at GDC 2025 in San Francisco.
news.summary: At the Game Developers Conference 2025 in San Francisco, Tencent's game security solution, Anti-Cheat Expert (ACE), demonstrated AI-driven anti-cheat technologies.

news.headline: DataRobot unveils AI suites for finance and supply chain operations with SAP to aid rapid AI implementation.
news.summary: In Boston today, DataRobot unveiled AI application suites for finance and supply chain operations in collaboration with SAP, tailored to seamlessly embed AI into customer setups and operational workflows. These newly introduced AI suites empower AI teams to efficiently deploy AI, safely leverage enterprise data, and expedite the deployment of AI solutions in accordance with the requirements of business users. The DataRobot AI application suites are crafted to optimize the utilization of AI in finance and supply chain management, facilitating a swift and secure integration of AI into existing processes.

news.headline: Exploding Kittens releasing 5 new games for Summer 2025, including first-ever board game.
news.summary: Popular game company, Exploding Kittens, based in Los Angeles, revealed plans to launch five new tabletop games in the summer of 2025. The announcement was made through a press release, with the company teasing the upcoming releases. The new games are expected to expand the company's gaming portfolio and cater to a wider audience. Stay tuned for more updates on these exciting additions to the Exploding Kittens game collection.

news.headline: Medit and Pearl partner to integrate AI into dental tech, enhancing diagnosis accuracy; Medit provides 3D scanners.
news.summary: In a recent joint announcement, Medit, a prominent supplier of dental 3D intraoral scanners and digital dentistry solutions, and Pearl, a global frontrunner in dental AI technology, declared a collaborative effort. The partnership aims to integrate Pearl’s AI-driven diagnostic features into Medit Link's platform. Through this collaboration, dental practitioners will benefit from enhanced intraoral scanning processes by merging Medit's precise imaging technology with Pearl's advanced AI capabilities. This integration will enable dental professionals to make more accurate diagnoses, ultimately improving patient care.

news.headline: Mathis Home partners with Blue Yonder to enhance customer satisfaction through better inventory planning, operated by Professional Services.
news.summary: One of the largest independent furniture retailers in America, Mathis Home, has chosen Blue Yonder to enhance its inventory planning and overall efficiency. This decision comes amid supply chain challenges in the furniture industry such as slow-moving inventory and capacity constraints, which are hard to handle through manual methods. The project, set to be executed by Blue Yonder Professional Services, aims to boost customer satisfaction. Mathis Home, founded in 1960, hopes that this move will help streamline operations and improve performance in response to these industry-wide challenges.

news.headline: ServiceMac wins Fannie Mae 2024 STAR Performer Award in 2 categories, 2nd year in a row, for excellence in mortgage subservicing.
news.summary: ServiceMac, a prominent player in mortgage subservicing and a member of the First American family, has just been honored with Fannie Mae’s 2024 Servicer Total Achievement and Rewards™ (STAR™) Performer award. This commendation was bestowed upon them in two categories, namely General Servicing and Solution Delivery. Notably, this marks the second year in a row that ServiceMac has clinched the STAR award in the General Servicing segment. Fannie Mae’s STAR Program is designed to acknowledge top-tier performance in the mortgage sector.
